description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, rectangular black metal head with two flat striking faces. The head is securely attached to a long, cylindrical wooden handle, which is light brown in color and appears smooth and straight. The handle is inserted through the center of the hammer head and is slightly rounded at the end for comfortable gripping. The metal head is fastened with visible metal pins or wedges on each side, ensuring stability during heavy use. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A sturdy sledgehammer with a black rectangular metal head and a long, smooth wooden handle. The design is simple, functional, and free of visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular black metal head with visible fastening pins.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the narrow face of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the head and handle.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the rectangular top of the hammer head and the handle passing through its center.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: sledgehammer head, rectangular, double flat striking faces, black metal, no claws or peens
